name: dcc-web
description: DCC session character sheets and tactical maps

scripts.build: bun run --filter @dcc-web/shared build && bun run --filter @dcc-web/api build && bun run --filter @dcc-web/web build
scripts.setup: bun scripts/ensure-env.ts && bun install && bun run db:generate && bun run stack && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
scripts.server: bun scripts/ensure-env.ts && bun run build:shared && bun run --filter @dcc-web/api server
scripts.start:server: bun run build && bun run --filter @dcc-web/api start
scripts.start: bun run build && bun run stack && concurrently -k -n api,web "bun run start:server" "bun run start:bundler"
